domain_archetypes.name: autopilot evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: autopilot signal changes while wealth context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: wealth boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: wealth handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: manager regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: manager behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: executes operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: executes output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
